tasks.title: Foundational Project Setup and CI/CD
tasks.description: This task covers the initial setup for the entire CareCircle ecosystem. It includes creating repositories for the NestJS backend, Next.js admin portal, and Flutter mobile app. It also involves establishing a CI/CD pipeline for automated builds and deployments, and initializing the core application modules and database schema as outlined in the BRD. This task is the foundational step for all subsequent development.

tasks.title: User Account & Profile Management (FR-01)
tasks.description: [Backend/NestJS, Mobile/Flutter, Frontend/Next.js] Implement user registration, login (email/password, Google/Apple SSO), profile management, and data consent flows as per FR-01.

tasks.title: Health Data Integration (FR-02)
tasks.description: [Mobile/Flutter, Backend/NestJS] Integrate with Apple HealthKit and Google Fit to sync, process, and display biometric and activity data. The backend will store and manage the synced data.

tasks.title: Prescription Management (OCR Scanner) (FR-03)
tasks.description: [Mobile/Flutter, Backend/NestJS] Develop the OCR-based prescription scanner, including image capture, data extraction (drug name, dosage, schedule), and manual entry/edit capabilities. The backend will handle the AI/OCR processing.

tasks.title: Intelligent Notification & Reminder System (FR-04)
tasks.description: [Backend/NestJS, Mobile/Flutter] Build the smart reminder system with actionable notifications, audit logging, and the adaptive notification engine. The mobile app will receive and display the notifications.

tasks.title: Intelligent Daily Check-ins (FR-05)
tasks.description: [Mobile/Flutter, Backend/NestJS] Implement the adaptive daily check-in feature with interactive notifications and personalized question flows. The backend will process and store the check-in data.

tasks.title: Care Groups & Family Network (FR-06)
tasks.description: [Backend/NestJS, Mobile/Flutter, Frontend/Next.js] Create the Care Group functionality, including secure invitations, deep linking, role-based permissions, and the shared dashboard.

tasks.title: AI-Powered Insights & Summaries (FR-07)
tasks.description: [Backend/NestJS] Develop the RAG-based AI system to generate summaries for medications, health conditions, and user data trends.

tasks.title: Document Export & Sharing (FR-08)
tasks.description: [Mobile/Flutter] Implement the feature to export user health summaries to a shareable PDF document.

tasks.title: Administrative Web Portal (FR-09)
tasks.description: [Frontend/Next.js] Build the Next.js admin portal with system health dashboards, user management tools, and AI cost monitoring.

tasks.title: User Settings & Personalization (FR-10)
tasks.description: [Mobile/Flutter, Frontend/Next.js, Backend/NestJS] Implement the comprehensive user settings screen, including modular UI, granular notification controls, and privacy settings.

tasks.title: Monetization & Growth Strategy (FR-11)
tasks.description: [Backend/NestJS, Mobile/Flutter] Implement the freemium model, in-app subscription purchases (IAP, MoMo, ZaloPay), and the user referral program.

tasks.title: Gamification & Engagement (FR-12)
tasks.description: [Backend/NestJS, Mobile/Flutter] Develop the Health Points system, badges, and achievements to drive user engagement.

tasks.title: Accessibility & Elder Mode (FR-13)
tasks.description: [Mobile/Flutter] Implement the simplified 'Elder Mode' with a high-contrast UI, large fonts, and voice prompts.

tasks.title: E-Pharmacy Integration (FR-15)
tasks.description: [Mobile/Flutter, Backend/NestJS] Integrate with partner e-pharmacy platforms for medication refill requests.

tasks.title: User Feedback (FR-18)
tasks.description: [Mobile/Flutter, Frontend/Next.js, Backend/NestJS] Add an in-app mechanism for users to submit feedback and bug reports.
